prompt: Optional.of throws NullPointerException. What is the bug?
choices: Optional.of returns Optional.empty() when passed null
Optional.of(null) throws NullPointerException; use Optional.ofNullable(name) to safely wrap a value that may be null
Optional cannot hold String values; use OptionalObject instead
explanation: Optional.of() requires a non-null argument and throws NullPointerException if null is passed. When the value may be null, use Optional.ofNullable(name), which returns Optional.empty() for null and Optional.of(value) otherwise.
